debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit p (ZMod p)) (cr : Circuit p (ℕ × ZMod p)) (G : List (Entry (ZMod p) (ℕ × ZMod p))),
    wf G cl cr →
      List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup p inst✝ (ZMod p) cr

failed_attempts:
by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_forall
  rw [dedup]
  generalize h_set : ([] : List (Exp (ZMod p) ℕ)) = set
  generalize h_n : 0 = n
  induction h_wf generalizing set n <;> simp [dedup_]
  case nil => rfl
  case eq0 e_l e_r c_l c_r h_eq h_wf ih =>
    split
    · exact ih
    · apply Circuit.equiv_eq0 h_eq ih
  case lam k_l k_r h_wf ih =>
    apply Circuit.equiv_lam
    intro x
    apply ih
  case share e_l e_r k_l k_r h_eq h_wf ih =>
    apply Circuit.equiv_share h_eq
    intro x
    apply ih
  case is_zero e_l e_r k_l k_r h_eq h_wf ih =>
    apply Circuit.equiv_is_zero h_eq
    intro x
    apply ih
  case assert_range w e_l e_r c_l c_r h_eq h_wf ih =>
    apply Circuit.equiv_assert_range h_eq ih
